dialogue_text: I'll give him sixpence. _I_ don't believe there's an atom of meaning in it.
source_excerpt: "If any one of them can explain it," said Alice, (she had grown so large in the last few minutes that she wasn't a bit afraid of interrupting him,) "I'll give him sixpence. _I_ don't believe there's an atom of meaning in it."

dialogue_text: _She_ doesn't believe there's an atom of meaning in it,
source_excerpt: The jury all wrote down on their slates, "_She_ doesn't believe there's an atom of meaning in it," but none of them attempted to explain the paper.

speaker.notes: No canonical speaker could be inferred from the source context.
